; AI_PATCH_BEGIN: boxer_bl:power_charge_shim:v1
; Compatibility power-charge shim generated from native charge sequence.
; Native hold state 11111, end state 11112.
; AI_PATCH_CHARGE_RATE_POLICY: Roxy/Rose-style ramp, not native per-tick burst gain.
[StateDef 730]
type = S
physics = S
moveType = I
anim = 11111
velSet = 0,0
ctrl = 0

[State 730, AI Patch Reused PlaySnd]
type = PlaySnd
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
value = s11111,0
channel = 11

[State 730, AI Patch Reused PlaySnd]
type = PlaySnd
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
value = s1,111
channel = 9

[State 730, AI Patch Reused Explod]
type = Explod
trigger1 = time = 0
anim = 11113
ID = 11111
sprpriority = 3
postype = p1
pos = -12,0
bindtime = -1
removeongethit = 1
; AI_PATCH_CHARGE_EFFECT_REFRESH: keep short non-looping hold explods alive while charge continues.
trigger2 = time > 0 && !NumExplod(11111)

[State 730, PowerAdd]
type = PowerAdd
triggerAll = Power < const(data.power) && Power < PowerMax
trigger1 = !AILevel && (command = "hold_a" || command = "hold_y" || command = "hold_c")
trigger2 = AILevel
value = 2 + ifElse(time < 60, 0, (time - 60) / 12)

[State 730, End]
type = ChangeState
trigger1 = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax || RoundState != 2
trigger2 = !AILevel && !(command = "hold_a" || command = "hold_y" || command = "hold_c")
trigger3 = AILevel && (InGuardDist || P2BodyDist X <= 120 || EnemyNear,MoveType = A || Enemy,NumProj > 0)
